checks.name: Takagi self-test: V unitary, V^T M V real diagonal ascending (50 random symmetric matrices)
old-benchmark chain computed and Davidson-Ibarra bound respected
refreshed-central chain computed and DI bound respected
sign convention stated: eta_B = -0.96e-2 eps1 kappa; matter needs eps1 < 0
BOTTLENECK ANALYSIS disclosed: the central slices underproduce |eta_B| -- strong washout times phase-suppressed epsilon_1; the required enhancement factor is quantified
Davidson-Ibarra bound respected across the whole posterior (consistency of the epsilon_1 implementation)
unflavored sign and magnitude diagnostics recorded (not physical posterior probabilities)
the success set is nonempty but RARE: on this slice thermal unflavored leptogenesis succeeds only in posterior tails
boost sensitivity: P(success) under a uniform O(1)-O(10) enhancement (flavor effects, resonance, convention) is quantified -- how far the slice sits from viability

unflavored conditioned-window diagnostic recorded, but not promoted to a phase constraint -- success correlates with none of the scanned variables strongly and the 14-sample window carries large statistical noise (flagged)
position of the old benchmark phase arg zeta = 0.6000 relative to the conditioned window DISCLOSED
success drivers DISCLOSED (correlations with cos a21, log10 m1, log10 M_1)

derivation_log.chain: M_R --Takagi--> (M_i, V); h = Y_nu V (v_u = 100 GeV); eps1 = (1/8pi) sum Im[(h^dag h)_{1j}^2] f_SUSY(x_j) / (h^dag h)_{11}; f_SUSY(x) = sqrt(x)[2/(1-x) - ln((1+x)/x)]; m_tilde = (h^dag h)_11 v_u^2/M_1; 1/kappa = 3.3e-3/m_tilde + (m_tilde/0.55e-3)^1.16 (eV); eta_B = -0.96e-2 eps1 kappa
derivation_log.priors: identical to DYN-4b (NuFit-6.0 IC24 gaussians x uniform Majorana phases x log-uniform m1)
derivation_log.sign_convention: eps1 > 0 = lepton excess; sphalerons give negative B; matter requires eps1 < 0
derivation_log.success_definition: eta_B > 0 AND |eta_B| within half a decade of 6.1e-10

finding: on the archival Dirac slice, thermal unflavored leptogenesis is MARGINAL: central chains give the wrong sign and |eta_B| ~ 1e-11 (30-70x short); P(success) ~ 0.4% (tails only); the required O(30-70) enhancement exceeds typical O(few) flavor corrections -> a soft kill-criterion entry for DYN-8, escapable by a modified Dirac sector (DYN-4c) or non-thermal production; arg zeta itself is NOT the lever on this slice
required_repair: provide tan(beta), branch-local thermal and spectator rates, and solve at least the two-flavor kinetic system (density matrix preferred)
